fundamentals.name: Spotify Technology S.A.
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: Spotify Technology S.A., together with its subsidiaries, provides audio streaming subscription services worldwide. It operates in two segments, Premium and Ad-Supported. The Premium segment offers online and offline streaming access to its catalog of music and podcasts, including video, lossless music, and audiobooks in select markets through subscription offerings primarily sold directly to end users and partners. The Ad-Supported segment provides limited on-demand online access to its catalog of music and online and offline access to its catalog of podcasts on computers, tablets, mobile devices, and other smart devices. The company also offers sales, distribution and marketing, contract research and development, and customer and other support services. Spotify Technology S.A. was incorporated in 2006 and is headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden.

judgment.summary: Spotify demonstrates robust growth in revenue and earnings, supported by strong margins and returns, though it carries significant debt relative to equity.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat estimates by 18.0%; next earnings date is 2026-07-28.
positives: Revenue growth 8.2% YoY, with substantial earnings growth of 222.4% YoY.
Profit margin at 15.4% and Return on Equity at 38.0% indicate strong profitability and efficiency.
Forward P/E of 28.66 suggests reasonable valuation relative to expected earnings growth.
Free cash flow of $707.75M provides ample operational liquidity.
negatives: Debt/Equity ratio of 5.94 is high, indicating significant leverage.
PEG ratio of 2.17 suggests the stock may be somewhat overvalued relative to its growth rate.
Beta of 1.55 indicates higher volatility compared to the broader market.

news.paragraph: Spotify's stock, SPOT, is trading at $529.71 as of May 26, 2026. Recent news includes a mention of NASA's moon base plans, a discussion on Bitcoin ETF inflows, and Agiloft being named a Fortune Best Workplace. Additionally, Triage Cancer and Bright Spot Network launched a program for parents with cancer. There is no direct news impacting Spotify's core business in the provided articles.

headlines.title: NASA lays out moon base plans with landers, buggies and drones at the top of the list
Grayscale exec says Bitcoin ETF inflows could reach $15B in 2026
Fortune Media and Great Place To Work Name Agiloft to 2026 Fortune Best Workplaces in the Bay Area
Triage Cancer® and Bright Spot Network Launch Free National Program for Parents Living with Metastatic Cancer
